summary:
The masseter muscle primarily attaches to the zygomatic process of the maxilla as confirmed by multiple reliable medical resources which highlight no other specific muscle shares exactly these same origins for attachment. This makes it a unique identifier among facial musculature concerning attachments at or near where mentioned clinically. To reiterate succinctly while focusing strictly per requirements provided earlier without extraneous details added previously; "Masseter" remains accurate due specifically noted direct connection there alone amongst all considered options medically documented thus far."
